item.title: Times, they are a-changing
item.description:
Two of those wins came against Democratic incumbents btw. https://time.com/article/2026/06/24/mamdani-new-york-primary-endorsements-election-results-lander-valdez-avila-chevalier-reactions/
And it’s not JUST those three
It’s really clear who rich people, corporations, and foreign lobbies want to win…

item.dc:creator: Kyzyl

item.title: We cannot force someone to hear a message they are not ready to receive, but we must never underestimate the power planting a seed.
item.description: Context: the Missus and i set up a booth at pride every year. I posted about it on a local-events Facebook page this year and got the mixed results you'd expect. I think im past the point of being angered by ignorance anymore and have taken what i call a "theyre all good dogs, bront" approach to addressing it when it comes up which, occasionally, gives me the opportunity to have conversations like this. It doesnt happen often but often enough.
item.dc:creator: ahorseelbowdeepinme

item.title: A Sixth Blue Moon Typhoon Dump of Stolen Things
item.description:
I laugh mainly because this would be me.
Me, daily.
Honestly though. Imo weakest movie of the OT and PT. Yes, I am willfully forgetting everything after 6.
H O N S E
Sound on for this one.
Yeah....same
Verified, this is actually true.
Hell yeah
Skywalker Set gets me every time.
I heard this is largely gibberish but I still laugh every time.
This is fake, but the wording is gold.
Favorite character in the entire franchise, by far. I think he did a good job acting with utter trash dialogue and zero chemistry with Natalie Portman. Viral Edit: Ooh thank you! I completely forgot I posted this.
item.dc:creator: BlueMoonTyphoon

item.title: I’m either 6’4” or 3’2”
item.description: The question I get asked the most on my cosplay is how tall I am. So I decided to show you my height secrets to success.

item.title: Government Efficiency?
item.description: Who is he giving the $1 billion contract to? His pool guy? The high school drop-out son of one of his golfing buddies?
item.dc:creator: Resistance1000

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1727 (cigarette sparrows)
item.description:
Woke up with a huge nosebleed, one of my rock tumblers broken (in a not repairable way so if i can ever afford it, need a new one), and after a nightmare that sits uncomfortably in memory like a sore tooth , so today is already going great. Let's get this bread i guess whatever.
Among other aspects, yes. I may not partake personally but I don't care if you do.
This bird is known as a Pyrrhuloxia
The one match i've made on hinge in two weeks couldn't carry on a decent conversation. Trying to start dating again is a mistake because I am inherently unwantable in a romantic manner. Thankfully, everyone does seem to like me on a friendly level so it could be worse.
Centrosaurus
Honestly, a fun date.
The Song of Solomon is such a weird piece of the Old Testament Canon. SURE. IT'S A METAPHOR FOR THE CHURCH. RIIIIIIGHT. And I'm OH COOL A JAVELINA JUST WALKED BEHIND MY APARTMENT Sorry where was I again?
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin. Pippin. Pippin! Pippin? Good boy." 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Cable Management Pornography
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: During a Trump rally in Lower Macungie, Pennsylvania, a man in the crowd shouted: “Pedophile!”. Security instantly dragged him toward the exit, but as he was being removed, the heckler turned around and flipped Trump the middle finger
item.description: Source: https://old.reddit.com/r/PublicFreakout/comments/1uee2qb/during_a_trump_rally_in_lower_macungie/ Uncensored if you're nasty: https://imgur.com/a/wu1iXsV
item.dc:creator: BygamistWilliams

item.title: Here we go again
item.description:
https://www.foxnews.com/media/democratic-strategist-calls-socialist-candidates-parasites-who-could-set-party-back-decades
Notice how they think the party is theirs and their donors, and not what voters make of it
Sooo the most favored candidates in the party are the issue. Got it
This was all said on a panel on Fox News. What should be abundantly clear is that the Democratic establishment, the liberal and moderate sides of the party, would rather work with the fascist Republicans than the Left. Link to the video: https://www.foxnews.com/video/6399192177112
item.dc:creator: Mgxr44

item.dc:creator: BuckFudddy

item.title: Scam/ID theft account warning
item.description:
This is an account that likes to steal images from other accounts and pretend it's their OC and that they're the person in the images/video. It used to vary a lot: lots of images from Russian sites with some insane sob story for attention (I found a Reddit thread at the time where they were copied from), although for a long-ish time they pretended to be sailorscholar from InstaGram:
They change their username more often than they change their identities. Now they're pretending to be babiegth from TikTok:
I report it each time, but Imgur doesn't seem to care. (I follow the account and get notified when they post. They used images from babiegth on a previous occasion as well, under the same username as the Cammie White cosplay.) After pointing out that it's fake way back when, the user immediately blocked me, hence this post, instead of just me responding there.
item.dc:creator: BeKindNWipeYourBehind
McPuffinStuff

item.description:
Apparently I posted without a title again. I'm fairly sure that was not always possible.
First of all, how dare you.
Me and who?
Merik was a punk bitch. Joey and Mai both outplayed him but he won using shadow magic.
The idea that the McCoy we get is the filtered version is awesome and terrifying.
RIP Monty
He won
Flesh and Blood TCG tax. An instantaneous 700% increase in Runechants is too much, and I'm a runeblade player
item.dc:creator: BenjyX55

item.title: Epstein Green

item.title: Dubbed comic of Huh (Yes, THAT one Imgur!) [OC]
item.description:
Comic dubbed by the animated pilot voice actors! Sound ON! VOICES Cooper: Oliver Lucas Fran: Brina Palencia Yes, we got a kid to say this. Yes, it was awkward! Oliver is a star though and his dad gave us permission! This was one of the highest voted comics by the Kickstarter backers to get dubbed -so I'm blaming you! ;) Subscribe on YouTube for when the animated pilot drops! https://www.youtube.com/@litterboxcomics
NEW MERCH!! I know these will be popular here! ;) https://litterboxcomics.shop/
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics
